title: Project Timeline
scenario: Create a project timeline for a software development project with the following milestones: Requirements Gathering, Design, Development, Testing, and Deployment. The timeline should include a brief description of each milestone and a rough estimate of the time required for each milestone. The output should be a clear and concise Gantt chart summarizing the project timeline.
constraints: Must include a title and a Gantt chart with at least 5 tasks
Must use a specific task ID format (e.g. 'TG-001')

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output includes a title and a Gantt chart with at least 5 tasks and uses the specific task ID format.
Check if the description of each task is clear and concise.
Check if the Gantt chart is correctly formatted and has a clear structure.
